subject: VPN disconnects every 10 minutes
description: Since the last update, my VPN drops every 10 minutes. I'm on Windows 11 using GlobalProtect. I've tried reinstalling but the issue persists.
reasoning: The ticket describes a VPN connection that drops every 10 minutes, which is a clear network connectivity issue. The problem is recurring and likely impacts work, but it is not described as an emergency or critical outage.
